The '''president''' of [[Galladinium Galactic Exports]] was a [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] during the reign of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. The president wrote a foreword for the ''[[Galladinium's Galactic Datalog of Fantastic Technology]]''{{'s}} [[Galladinium's 50th anniversary edition|50th anniversary edition]].<ref name="GFT" />

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Galladinium's illustration was a mirrored version of [[Olev Madak]] from ''[[Platt's Starport Guide]]''.<ref name="GFT" />
